title: Analysts pinpoint winners  in new stimulus scheme
desc: Analysts are highlighting retail and consumer stocks as the major beneficiaries of Thailand's latest consumer stimulus programme called "Thai Chuay Thai Plus", which is expected to provide short-term support for domestic consumption to stabilise the economy.
title_cn: 分析师看好新刺激计划中的零售和消费股
summary_cn: 针对泰国最新推出的消费刺激计划「Thai Chuay Thai Plus」，多位分析师一致看好零售和消费相关股票的投资前景。该计划旨在为国内消费市场提供短期支持，帮助稳定国内经济增长。分析师认为零售和消费类企业将成为该计划最主要的受益方，相关股票有望在短期内获得投资机会。
desc_original: Analysts are highlighting retail and consumer stocks as the major beneficiaries of Thailand's latest consumer stimulus programme called "Thai Chuay Thai Plus", which is expected to provide short-term support for domestic consumption to stabilise the economy.

title: Transition funds nudge motorists towards EVs
desc: Part of the government's spending plan for the transition to clean energy involves encouraging the public to switch to electric vehicles (EVs) on a wider scale, says finance permanent secretary Lavaron Sangsnit.
title_cn: 转型基金驱动泰国电动车普及浪潮
summary_cn: 作为政府清洁能源转型支出计划的核心内容，泰国财政常秘拉瓦隆（Lavaron Sangsnit）表示，政府将通过转型基金支持，鼓励广大民众加速切换至电动车，实现更大规模的能源转型升级。该举措是泰国能源结构优化和环保目标实现的重要步骤，预计将显著推动泰国电动车市场的发展。
desc_original: Part of the government's spending plan for the transition to clean energy involves encouraging the public to switch to electric vehicles (EVs) on a wider scale, says finance permanent secretary Lavaron Sangsnit.

title: Tourism authorities plan shake-up of short-haul markets
desc: Amid intense competition among Asian countries to attract the Chinese market, the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) is rolling out its "NEXT" marketing strategies for fiscal 2027 to reduce dependence on certain short-haul markets.
title_cn: 泰国旅游局推出「NEXT」战略重塑短途市场
summary_cn: 在亚洲各国激烈争夺中国游客的背景下，泰国旅游局（TAT）宣布推出2027财年「NEXT」营销战略，意图通过策略调整降低对特定短途市场的依赖程度。新战略的核心目标是优化泰国旅游市场的客源结构，开拓更多样化的客源市场，促进泰国旅游产业的长期可持续发展。
desc_original: Amid intense competition among Asian countries to attract the Chinese market, the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) is rolling out its "NEXT" marketing strategies for fiscal 2027 to reduce dependence on certain short-haul markets.

title: Markets bullish despite flare-up in Middle East
desc: Even though an Iran peace deal appears elusive amid new US strikes, stock sentiment remains convinced the conflict is winding down, which could push up the Thai bourse to 1,600 points by the end of the year, say analysts.
title_cn: 中东局势波澜起伏 股市仍持乐观态度
summary_cn: 尽管伊朗和平协议仍遥遥无期，美国继续进行新的军事行动，但全球股市情绪依然乐观。分析师普遍认为中东冲突局势正在逐步缓解，这种积极预期推动了投资者的信心。基于这一市场共识，分析师预测泰国证交所指数有望在年底前突破1600点水平，呈现出明显的上升趋势。
desc_original: Even though an Iran peace deal appears elusive amid new US strikes, stock sentiment remains convinced the conflict is winding down, which could push up the Thai bourse to 1,600 points by the end of the year, say analysts.

title: Police step up Pattani ambush probe
desc: Police are accelerating DNA tests and forensic checks after gunmen ambushed a police officer outside a school in Pattani, killing his wife, a teacher.
title_cn: 巴真府警官遭伏击妻子遇难 警方加紧侦查
summary_cn: 巴真府（Pattani）近日发生一起严重治安事件。一名警官在学校外遭到枪手伏击，其妻子（系教师）在袭击中不幸身亡。事件发生后，警方迅速启动调查程序，正在加速进行DNA检验和法医鉴定等工作，以期尽快破案，维护地方安全稳定。
desc_original: Police are accelerating DNA tests and forensic checks after gunmen ambushed a police officer outside a school in Pattani, killing his wife, a teacher.

title: PP tables new charter rewrite bill
desc: The People's Party (PP) on Wednesday submitted two constitutional amendment bills to parliament proposing mechanisms for drafting a new constitution while reaffirming three key principles: public participation, prevention of political monopolisation and opposition to expanding the Senate's special powers.
title_cn: 人民党提交新宪法修订案
summary_cn: 人民党（PP）向议会提交两项宪法修正案，提议制定新宪法的相关机制，并重申三项关键原则：确保公众参与、防止政治力量垄断、反对扩大参议院特殊权力。这一举措旨在推进泰国宪政改革进程。
desc_original: The People's Party (PP) on Wednesday submitted two constitutional amendment bills to parliament proposing mechanisms for drafting a new constitution while reaffirming three key principles: public participation, prevention of political monopolisation and opposition to expanding the Senate's special powers.

title: Panic in Sattahip as suspected gold shop robbery turns into glass door mishap
desc: CCTV footage showed the man entering the store calmly before accidentally walking straight into the glass, causing panic among employees and nearby residents. PATTAYA, Thailand – Police in Sattahip rushed to what was initially believed to be a gold shop robbery on May 27, only to discover that the dramatic incident was actually caused by a local man accidentally walking into a glass panel inside the store. Officers from Sattahip Police Station, along with administrative officials and more than 10 armed personnel, responded immediately after receiving reports that a suspect had smashed glass in
title_cn: 沙塔希普金店疑遭抢劫乌龙案：男子误撞玻璃门
summary_cn: 沙塔希普警方接报金店遭抢，迅速出动数十名警力赶赴现场。最终发现这场惊人事件竟是虚惊一场——当地一名男子不慎走进店内后直接撞上玻璃门。监控录像显示，该男子原本镇定地进入店内，随即撞上透明玻璃，引发员工和周边居民的惊慌失措。

title: Pattaya mayoral hopeful Poramet visits Baan Mankong community as election race intensifies
desc: Pattaya mayoral hopeful Poramet Ngampichet greets residents during a campaign visit to the Baan Mankong Pattaya community on Sukhumvit-Pattaya Soi 27. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya mayoral hopeful Poramet Ngampichet and candidates from the “Rao Rak Pattaya” (We Love Pattaya) group visited the Baan Mankong Pattaya community on Sukhumvit-Pattaya Soi 27 on May 26 as local election campaigning continued to intensify ahead of the upcoming city elections. Poramet, accompanied by prospective Pattaya City Council candidates for District 1, walked through the large residential community meeting residents
title_cn: 芭提雅市长候选人波拉迈走访班蛮空社区，竞选活动升温
summary_cn: 芭提雅市长候选人波拉迈（Poramet Ngampichet）及其「热爱芭提雅」团队候选人于 5 月 26 日走访班蛮空社区，在苏坤逸路（Sukhumvit）芭提雅 27 巷与居民互动交流。这是随着芭提雅市政选举临近，候选人加强地方基层活动、争取选民支持的一部分竞选战略。

title: Drunken clash erupts between foreigner and security guard on Pattaya Walking Street
desc: A drunken dispute between a foreign tourist and a nightclub security guard briefly turned into a street fight on Pattaya Walking Street during the early hours of May 27 before bystanders stepped in to calm the situation. PATTAYA, Thailand – Early morning chaos briefly erupted on Pattaya’s famous Walking Street after an intoxicated foreign tourist became involved in a confrontation with a nightclub security guard, leading to a fight in the middle of the busy entertainment district. The incident occurred between approximately 3:00 a.m. and 4:00 a.m. on May 27, drawing the attention of nearby tou
title_cn: 芭提雅步行街外国游客与保安冲突，酒后闹事
summary_cn: 5 月 27 日凌晨 3 至 4 点，芭提雅步行街（Pattaya Walking Street）发生醉酒冲突事件。一名醉醺醺的外国游客与某夜店保安起争执，短暂演变为街头斗殴，在旁观者和现场人员的调停下才得以化解。该事件虽未造成严重伤害，但反映出在娱乐场所的潜在安全隐患。

title: Motorcycle slams into pedestrian crossing North Pattaya Road, three injured
desc: A motorcycle crashed into a pedestrian crossing in front of Lotus North Pattaya on May 27, leaving three people injured, including a pedestrian who suffered serious head injuries. PATTAYA, Thailand – Three people were injured after a motorcycle struck a pedestrian crossing the road in North Pattaya on May 27, prompting an emergency response from Pattaya municipal officers, police, and rescue personnel. The accident occurred in front of Lotus North Pattaya, where traffic officers from Pattaya City and police from Pattaya Police Station rushed to the scene to manage traffic and prevent further a
title_cn: 摩托车撞行人，北芭提雅路交通事故造成三人受伤
summary_cn: 5 月 27 日上午，北芭提雅路沃尔玛超市（Lotus North Pattaya）门前发生摩托车与行人碰撞事故，导致三人受伤，其中一名行人头部受重伤。事故发生后，芭提雅市政部门、警方及救援人员迅速赶赴现场处置，并进行交通管制防止进一步事故发生。

title: Pattaya warns businesses against blocking public parking spaces
desc: Pattaya municipal officers remove unauthorized traffic cones and roadside barriers used by businesses to reserve public parking spaces during a citywide enforcement campaign. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya City officials are stepping up efforts to improve public order and accessibility by targeting businesses and individuals who illegally reserve parking spaces on public roads using traffic cones and other barriers. Municipal enforcement officers said the campaign is part of a broader push to create a cleaner, safer, and more organized city while encouraging residents and businesses to respect sh
title_cn: 芭提雅清理违规占用公共停车位，严查商家设置交通锥
summary_cn: 芭提雅市政部门近期开展专项执法行动，清理商家用交通锥和路边障碍物非法预留公共停车位的现象。这一整治是改善城市秩序、提升公共空间可访问性的更大举措的一部分，旨在营造更清洁、更安全、更有序的城市环境，同时鼓励居民和企业尊重共有资源。
desc_original: Pattaya municipal officers remove unauthorized traffic cones and roadside barriers used by businesses to reserve public parking spaces during a citywide enforcement campaign. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya City officials are stepping up efforts to improve public order and accessibility by targeting businesses and individuals who illegally reserve parking spaces on public roads using traffic cones and other barriers. title: Woman, 29, dies after falling from Pattaya condo as police question British boyfriend
desc: Police and forensic officers investigated after a 29-year-old woman died following a fall from a condominium building in Pattaya’s Kasetsin area, while officers also gathered information from her British boyfriend. PATTAYA, Thailand – A 29-year-old woman died after falling from a condominium building in Pattaya on the evening of May 26, with police launching an investigation into the circumstances surrounding the incident. Officers from Pattaya Police Station responded to reports of a fatal fall at a condominium project in Kasetsin Soi 2, Pratumnak Hill in South Pattaya, at approximately 5:28
title_cn: 29岁女性芭提雅公寓坠亡，英国男友接受警方调查
summary_cn: 5月26日晚约5时28分，一名29岁女性从芭提雅南端普拉图姆纳克山 Pratumnak Hill 卡塞特信地区 Kasetsin 的公寓建筑坠落身亡。芭提雅警察局派遣警官和法医人员赶赴现场展开调查。警方同时向涉事人士——该女性的英国男友收集证词，暂未披露坠亡的具体原因或性质。

title: Pattaya launches beach cigarette butt cleanup rally ahead of World No Tobacco Day
desc: Pattaya officials, youth groups, hotel operators, and community representatives joined a beach cleanup rally at Central Pattaya Beach ahead of World No Tobacco Day. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya City officials, community groups, and local businesses joined forces on May 27 for a beach cleanup rally aimed at reducing cigarette butt waste and promoting smoke-free public spaces ahead of World No Tobacco Day on May 31. The event took place along Central Pattaya Beach and was officially opened by Deputy City Clerk Kiattisak Sriwongchai. Participants included representatives from the city’s Public Hea
title_cn: 芭提雅海滩清洁行动倡导无烟环境，迎接世界无烟日
summary_cn: 5月27日，芭提雅市政府、社区团体和当地企业在中央芭提雅海滩 Central Pattaya Beach 联合举办海滩清洁活动，旨在减少烟头污染、推广无烟公共场所。活动由副市政书记基亚蒂萨克·斯里翁差主持，参与者包括公共卫生部门代表、酒店经营者和青年组织等各界人士，为即将到来的世界无烟日（5月31日）造势。
desc_original: Pattaya officials, youth groups, hotel operators, and community representatives joined a beach cleanup rally at Central Pattaya Beach ahead of World No Tobacco Day. title: Russian tourists from Pattaya praise Sai Kaew Beach as coastal tourism in Sattahip grows
desc: Russian visitors traveling from Pattaya with friends said they were impressed by Sai Kaew Beach’s clear water and peaceful atmosphere from the moment they arrived. PATTAYA, Thailand – As Thailand’s summer travel season continues to attract both domestic and international visitors, Sai Kaew Beach in Sattahip is emerging as one of the eastern seaboard’s most popular coastal escapes, drawing tourists seeking a quieter and more natural alternative to nearby Pattaya. Located just a 20–30 minute drive south of Pattaya, Sai Kaew Beach has become increasingly popular during weekends and holiday period
title_cn: 赛开海滩成东海岸新热点，沙吐海岸旅游业增长强劲
summary_cn: 赛开海滩 Sai Kaew Beach 位于沙吐 Sattahip，距离芭提雅仅20-30分钟车程，因清澈海水和宁静氛围成为东海岸新兴热门目的地。随着泰国夏季旅游旺季持续，越来越多游客选择赛开海滩作为逃离人满为患芭提雅的替代方案。来自芭提雅的俄罗斯游客赴访后对该海滩赞不绝口，特别是在周末和假日期间，赛开海滩人气持续增长。
desc_original: Russian visitors traveling from Pattaya with friends said they were impressed by Sai Kaew Beach’s clear water and peaceful atmosphere from the moment they arrived. PATTAYA, Thailand – As Thailand’s summer travel season continues to attract both domestic and international visitors, Sai Kaew Beach in Sattahip is emerging as one of the eastern seaboard’s most popular coastal escapes, drawing tourists seeking a quieter and more natural alternative to nearby Pattaya. title: Pattaya tourists continue arriving at Koh Larn Pier as storm clouds gather
desc: Tourists arrive at Koh Larn’s pier under hot and humid skies as Pattaya braces for afternoon thunderstorms and shifting monsoon weather along Thailand’s eastern coast. (Photo by Jetsada Homklin) PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya is experiencing a mix of intense heat, high humidity, and increasing chances of thunderstorms as monsoon conditions begin strengthening across Thailand’s eastern coast. Tourists heading to beaches and nearby islands such as Koh Larn have continued enjoying sunny mornings and calm seas, but weather forecasters warn that afternoon and evening storms are becoming more frequent
title_cn: 游客继续涌向龙岛，芭提雅季风天气变化雷暴频现
summary_cn: 芭提雅正经历酷热、高湿度的天气，夏季季风沿泰国东海岸逐渐增强。尽管如此，游客们仍继续涌向龙岛 Koh Larn 等近岛海滩，利用上午晴朗平静的海面享受水上活动。但气象部门警告称，午后和傍晚雷暴日益频繁，游客应做好防范准备、密切关注最新气象预报，以免行程受阻或遭遇突发天气。
desc_original: Tourists arrive at Koh Larn’s pier under hot and humid skies as Pattaya braces for afternoon thunderstorms and shifting monsoon weather along Thailand’s eastern coast. (Photo by Jetsada Homklin) PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya is experiencing a mix of intense heat, high humidity, and increasing chances of thunderstorms as monsoon conditions begin strengthening across Thailand’s eastern coast. title: Resilience at the heart of economic success
desc: A comprehensive vision is needed for strengthening Thailand’s resilience and competitiveness, says Industry Minister Varawut Silpa-archa, who warned of mounting global challenges while emphasising the need for human development, innovation, sustainability and inclusive growth.
title_cn: 韧性：泰国经济成功的核心
summary_cn: 泰国工业部长瓦拉瓦特·西帕察强调，面对日益复杂的全球挑战，泰国需要制定全面的综合愿景来加强国家韧性和竞争力。他指出，人力资源发展、技术创新、可持续性和包容性增长是实现经济成功的关键支柱。
desc_original: A comprehensive vision is needed for strengthening Thailand’s resilience and competitiveness, says Industry Minister Varawut Silpa-archa, who warned of mounting global challenges while emphasising the need for human development, innovation, sustainability and inclusive growth.

title: 5 of 7 people trapped in Laos cave found alive
desc: Five of the seven people trapped in a flooded cave for a week in Laos were found alive on Wednesday afternoon, Lao and Thai rescuers said.
title_cn: 老挝洞穴被困事件：7人中5人获救
summary_cn: 被困在老挝洞穴长达一周的7人中，有5人于周三下午被老挝和泰国联合救援队成功找到并救出。这起跨境救援事件体现了地区间的人道主义合作。
desc_original: Five of the seven people trapped in a flooded cave for a week in Laos were found alive on Wednesday afternoon, Lao and Thai rescuers said.

title: Police chief tells commanders to rein in officers moonlighting as influencers
desc: Police chief tells commanders to rein in officers moonlighting as influencers Legacy Thailand’s national police chief has issued an urgent directive ordering senior commanders nationwide to tighten supervision of Thai police officers who appear on social media in uniform , days after personally cutting a fellow officer’s hair during a station inspection to demonstrate grooming standards. Police General Kittharath Punpetch signed a memo yesterday, May 26, addressed to commanders at all levels. The directive followed a visit on May 22 to Ko Sichang Police Station in Chon Buri provinc
title_cn: 泰国警察总长下令严管穿制服做网红的警察
summary_cn: 泰国警察总长基蒂拉特·蓬佩差签署备忘录，下令全国各级指挥官加强对穿警服在社交媒体出镜的警察的监管。此前他在巴吞他尼府芝章岛警察局视察时亲自示范仪容标准，强调警务人员应当遵守纪律和形象要求。
desc_original: Police chief tells commanders to rein in officers moonlighting as influencers Legacy Thailand’s national police chief has issued an urgent directive ordering senior commanders nationwide to tighten supervision of Thai police officers who appear on social media in uniform , days after personally cutting a fellow officer’s hair during a station inspection to demonstrate grooming standards. Police General Kittharath Punpetch signed a memo yesterday, May 26, addressed to commanders at al

title: 中国电动汽车4月出口量大涨，泰国位列第四
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 彭博社的报道称，今年4月份，中国电动汽车的全球出口量同比增长了40%，总计达278,081辆。其中，亚洲是最大的出口市场，泰国则在全球各大出口目的地中位居第四。另外，中国对欧盟的出口量也较去年同期增长了41%，共63,063辆。 中国海关的数据显示，4月份中国对巴西的电动汽车出口量同比暴增221%，共38,144辆，在所有国家和地区中排名第一。对泰国的出口量排在第四位，共19,882辆，同比增长78%；菲律宾紧随泰国之后，出口量共19,577辆，同比增长27%；对印度尼西亚出口共7,205辆，同比下降10%。 从区域来看，亚洲是中国电动汽车的最大出口目的地，共110,613辆，同比增长20%；之后依次为欧洲，出口量为83,813辆，同比增长36%；拉丁美洲和加勒比地区，出口量为52,897辆，同比增长80%。 （编译：KA；来源：prachachat） The post 中国电动汽车4月出口量大涨，泰国位列第四 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 中国电动汽车4月出口量大涨，泰国位列第四
summary_cn: 根据中国海关数据，4月份中国电动汽车全球出口量同比增长40%，达278,081辆。亚洲为最大出口市场，泰国排名第四，出口量达19,882辆，同比增长78%。中国对巴西出口增长最快，达221%；对欧盟出口63,063辆，增长41%。拉丁美洲出口增长80%。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 彭博社的报道称，今年4月份，中国电动汽车的全球出口量同比增长了40%，总计达278,081辆。其中，亚洲是最大的出口市场，泰国则在全球各大出口目的地中位居第四。另外，中国对欧盟的出口量也较去年同期增长了41%，共63,063辆。 中国海关的数据显示，4月份中国对巴西的电动汽车出口量同比暴增221%，共38,144辆，在所有国家和地区中排名第一。对泰国的出口量排在第四位，共19,882辆，同比增长78%；菲律宾紧随泰国之后，出口量共19,577辆，同比增长27%；对印度尼西亚出口共7,205辆，同比下降10%。 从区域来看，亚洲是中国电动汽车的最大出口目的地，共110,613辆，同比增长20%；之后依次为欧洲，出口量为83,813辆，同比增长36%；拉丁美洲和加勒比地区，出口量为52,897辆，同比增长80%。 （编译：KA；来源：prachachat） The post 中国电动汽车4月出口量大涨，泰国位列第四 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: 泰国房地产市场回暖，二手房走俏
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月27日，泰国政府住房银行房地产信息中心（REIC）代理主任兼市场营销副总裁纳隆蓬透露，2026年第一季度住宅市场情况报告显示，在政府刺激措施的带动下，市场已开始出现复苏信号，全国产权过户总数达72,583套，同比增长11.2%；总值约1871.82亿泰铢，同比增长3.1%。REIC认为，这一数字反映出泰国人的购房需求持续存在，只是消费者越来越倾向于根据自身购买力选择更合适的房价和房屋大小。 其中，过户量增长最突出的是孔敬府，增长30.3%；其次是罗勇府，增长24.0%。在奢侈住宅市场的带动下，普吉府的过户价值增长最多，达34.9%。而曼谷虽然过户数量增长了11.1%，但过户价值却下降了4.5%，表明市场正转向更亲民的价格区间。曼谷周边府县如暖武里府和巴吞他尼府，则在数量和价值上都保持稳定增长。 另外，“二手房”已成为买家的主流选择，占整体过户量的67%，新房仅占33%。REIC指出，价格不超过700万泰铢的房屋仍是增长主力，无论新房还是二手房都表现不错；超过700万泰铢的高端市场则明显放缓，尤其是受中国资本购买力和措施影响的奢侈住宅。 战争和全球危机的影响将在2026年第二季度开始明显，因为第一季度的交易大多是之前已经谈好的预售。当前的建筑材料成本令人担忧，特别是运输、水泥和钢铁，价格已上涨约15-20%，可能将导致后续的新房价格再上涨5-10%，进而让消费者
title_cn: 泰国房地产市场回暖，二手房走俏
summary_cn: 泰国政府住房银行数据显示，2026年第一季度住宅市场出现复苏迹象。全国产权过户总数达72,583套，同比增长11.2%，总值约1,871.82亿泰铢。二手房占比67%成为主流选择，价格不超过700万泰铢的房屋为增长主力。孔敬府和罗勇府增长最突出，高端市场则放缓。

title: MRT Blue Line max fare drops by one baht from July 3
desc: MRT Blue Line max fare drops by one baht from July 3 Legacy Bangkok’s MRT Blue Line will lower its maximum fare by one baht from July 3, with the Royal Gazette publishing new fare regulations on May 26 that bring ticket prices in line with the concession contract’s pricing formula. The adjusted range runs from 17 to 44 baht, down one baht from the current range of 17 to 45 baht. Mass Rapid Transit Authority of Thailand (MRTA) Governor Kajphajong Udomthammapakdi confirmed the change is a reduction, not an increase, noting that confusion had arisen after some readers interpreted the
title_cn: 曼谷轻轨蓝线（MRT Blue Line）最高票价将于7月3日起下调1泰铢
summary_cn: 曼谷轻轨蓝线将从7月3日起降低最高票价。泰国皇家公报于5月26日公布新的运费规定，新票价范围调整为17-44泰铢，较现行的17-45泰铢区间下降1泰铢。泰国大众快速运输管理局（MRTA）总裁表示这是降价调整，目的是将票价与特许经营合同的定价公式相一致，以消除乘客的疑惑。
desc_original: MRT Blue Line max fare drops by one baht from July 3 Legacy Bangkok’s MRT Blue Line will lower its maximum fare by one baht from July 3, with the Royal Gazette publishing new fare regulations on May 26 that bring ticket prices in line with the concession contract’s pricing formula. The adjusted range runs from 17 to 44 baht, down one baht from the current range of 17 to 45 baht. title: 泰国公布高铁施工事故调查结果：多方系统性失职导致
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月27日，泰国交通部副次长兼事实调查委员会负责人吉拉鹏表示，经过调查，今年1月14日在呵叻府色乔县发生的“泰中高铁施工起重机倒塌并砸中客运列车”事故，系多方在系统上的严重失职导致的，属于不可接受的违约行为。据悉，该事故地点位于泰中高铁合作项目第3-4标段中第4套移动式架桥的建设范围内，起重机的前支撑底座从超过10米高处坠落，砸中了从曼谷开往乌汶的第21次特快列车，正好在农南坤站和色乔站之间。事故共导致31人死亡，包括30名乘客和1名施工人员，另有71人受伤；三节车厢受损，其中第二节变形且起火，第三节脱轨；迫使东北铁路线南段停运10天，影响14余趟列车。 事故发生后，事实调查委员会和由泰国工程师协会领导的工程小组，在45天内进行彻底的调查，包括： – 实地勘察事故现场和物证存放处，对材料进行破坏性和非破坏性测试，用电子显微镜检查断裂的钢筋； – 建立工程模型还原垮塌的完整过程； – 询问所有相关方，包括承包商、监理单位、项目业主，以及沿线各车站的工作人员。 本次事故的关键是第4套移动式架桥，其靠三支腿站立，用于逐段吊装数百吨重的混凝土构件。按照规范，它在向前移动前，必须先把中间支腿拉到前支腿处，共同分担重量。但事发当天，作业人员直接跳过了这个关键步骤，直接移动吊车，结果超过700吨的重量全部压在单一的前支腿上，预应力钢棒（PT
title_cn: 泰国公布高铁施工事故调查结果：多方系统性失职导致
summary_cn: 泰中高铁项目第3-4标段1月14日在呵叻府（Nakhon Ratchasima）发生移动式架桥起重机倒塌事故，砸中曼谷至乌汶特快列车第21班次，造成31人死亡、71人受伤。调查发现承包方作业人员跳过关键步骤，直接移动吊车，导致700多吨重量全压在单一前支腿上，致预应力钢棒断裂。事故系多方在系统上的严重失职，被认定为不可接受的违约行为。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月27日，泰国交通部副次长兼事实调查委员会负责人吉拉鹏表示，经过调查，今年1月14日在呵叻府色乔县发生的“泰中高铁施工起重机倒塌并砸中客运列车”事故，系多方在系统上的严重失职导致的，属于不可接受的违约行为。据悉，该事故地点位于泰中高铁合作项目第3-4标段中第4套移动式架桥的建设范围内，起重机的前支撑底座从超过10米高处坠落，砸中了从曼谷开往乌汶的第21次特快列车，正好在农南坤站和色乔站之间。事故共导致31人死亡，包括30名乘客和1名施工人员，另有71人受伤；三节车厢受损，其中第二节变形且起火，第三节脱轨；迫使东北铁路线南段停运10天，影响14余趟列车。 事故发生后，事实调查委员会和由泰国工程师协会领导的工程小组，在45天内进行彻底的调查，包括： – 实地勘察事故现场和物证存放处，对材料进行破坏性和非破坏性测试，用电子显微镜检查断裂的钢筋； – 建立工程模型还原垮塌的完整过程； – 询问所有相关方，包括承包商、监理单位、项目业主，以及沿线各车站的工作人员。 本次事故的关键是第4套移动式架桥，其靠三支腿站立，用于逐段吊装数百吨重的混凝

title: A business class taught them to make money, but Bangkok taught them to give it away
desc: A business class taught them to make money, but Bangkok taught them to give it away Legacy Most school business projects end with a grade. This one ended with a donation to UNICEF. At the Australian International School Bangkok (AISB), a group of Year 9 students spent months building real businesses by sourcing products, managing finances, and dealing with the inevitable setbacks. Standard stuff, on paper. But somewhere along the way, the assignment stopped being about profit. It started as coursework. Then it became something no one planned for As part of their IGCSE Cambridge Enterprise prog
title_cn: 商业课教他们赚钱，曼谷教他们布施
summary_cn: 澳洲国际学校曼谷校区（AISB）9年级学生参加IGCSE剑桥企业项目，分组创办真实商业项目，涉及产品采购、财务管理和应对挫折等环节。学生最初以获得成绩为目标，但在实践过程中改变初衷，最终将商业项目所得利润全部捐赠给联合国儿童基金会（UNICEF），体现了在曼谷生活经历给予他们的社会责任感。
desc_original: A business class taught them to make money, but Bangkok taught them to give it away Legacy Most school business projects end with a grade. This one ended with a donation to UNICEF. At the Australian International School Bangkok (AISB), a group of Year 9 students spent months building real businesses by sourcing products, managing finances, and dealing with the inevitable setbacks. Standard stuff, on paper. But somewhere along the way, the assignment stopped being about profit. It started as cour

title: Thailand train-bus crash compensation paid, motorists charged
desc: Thailand train-bus crash compensation paid, motorists charged Legacy Six of the eight families of those killed in the Thailand train bus collision on May 16 have received compensation , with charges filed against the train driver and motorists found blocking the tracks , Deputy Transport Minister Siripong Angkaskulkiat announced yesterday, May 26. The Bangkok Mass Transit Authority (BMTA) and the State Railway of Thailand (SRT) have jointly paid out 2.9 million baht to the six approved families. A further 300,000 baht per case is pending approval from the Rights Protection Fund, with the BMTA
title_cn: 泰国列车与公交碰撞事故：六个受害家庭获赔，责任人被起诉
summary_cn: 5月16日发生的列车与公交车碰撞事故造成8人丧生。截至5月26日，6个受害者家庭已获得由曼谷公共汽车公司（BMTA）和泰国国有铁路公司（SRT）联合支付的290万泰铢赔偿金。另有每案30万泰铢正待权利保护基金批准。副运输部长已宣布对列车驾驶员及占道驾驶人员提起诉讼。
desc_original: Thailand train-bus crash compensation paid, motorists charged Legacy Six of the eight families of those killed in the Thailand train bus collision on May 16 have received compensation , with charges filed against the train driver and motorists found blocking the tracks , Deputy Transport Minister Siripong Angkaskulkiat announced yesterday, May 26. The Bangkok Mass Transit Authority (BMTA) and the State Railway of Thailand (SRT) have jointly paid out 2.9 million baht to the six approved families.

title: Thailand’s 12-Year Shame. Taylor Swift cancelled concert because of a Military coup
desc: Thailand’s 12-Year Shame. Taylor Swift cancelled concert because of a Military coup Legacy Thai fans buying a ticket months in advance. Knowing every word of every song. Counting down the days. Then waking up to news that has nothing to do with music and everything to do with why the show won’t happen. That’s exactly where Thai Taylor Swift fans found themselves in May 2014. And twelve years later, they’re still waiting. The Red Tour was supposed to hit Bangkok on June 9, 2014. Swift’s first-ever performance in Thailand. Every ticket, priced between 2,000 and 6,50
title_cn: 泰国12年的遗憾：军事政变导致泰勒·斯威夫特取消曼谷演唱会
summary_cn: 原定于2014年6月9日在曼谷举办的泰勒·斯威夫特（Taylor Swift）The Red Tour演唱会因泰国军事政变而遭取消。众多泰国粉丝提前数月购票（票价2000-6500泰铢），却因政治局势突变而无法成行。这是泰勒·斯威夫特首次计划来泰国演出，至今12年过去，粉丝们仍在期待这位国际巨星重返泰国舞台。

title: Turkish tourist found dead in Phuket residence
desc: Turkish tourist found dead in Phuket residence Legacy A 30 year old Turkish national was found dead in a residence in Kamala, Phuket , on May 26, with police reporting no signs of assault or foul play. Cannabis and drug paraphernalia were discovered in the room where the body was found. Kamala Police Station received reports from rescue workers at around 3.30pm, and officers travelled to a three-storey house in Kamala subdistrict, Kathu district, Phuket. The body was found lying near the bedroom door on the third floor. Police say there were no visible wounds or signs of a physical altercation
title_cn: 土耳其游客在普吉岛住处遇难
summary_cn: 一名30岁土耳其籍男子在普吉岛卡马拉地区(Kamala)住处被发现身亡，遗体位于三楼卧室门旁。警方未发现明显伤口或暴力打斗痕迹，但房间内发现大麻和毒品工具，死因仍待进一步调查确认。

title: Chaiyaphum teen arrested over alleged sexual assault on mother
desc: Chaiyaphum teen arrested over alleged sexual assault on mother Legacy A teenager has been arrested in Chaiyaphum after allegedly sexually assaulting his mother while under the influence of alcohol and methamphetamine . The alleged incident took place on May 25 in Kaset Sombun district and was reported to local police the following morning. The mother told investigators her son entered her room , struck her and carried out the assault . She said she did not resist further out of fear that he would kill her. After the incident, the suspect fetched his older brother to return home and sleep in th
title_cn: 差春县(Chaiyaphum)少年因涉嫌性侵母亲被捕
summary_cn: 差春府一名少年因在酒精和甲基苯丙胺(冰毒)影响下涉嫌对其母亲进行性侵而被捕，事件发生于5月25日，地点在格赛松本县(Kaset Sombun district)。受害者因害怕儿子可能杀害她而未作抵抗，事件翌日向警方报案。

title: Chud Thai conquered Paris. Thailand’s most elegant dress 66 years in the making.
desc: Chud Thai conquered Paris. Thailand’s most elegant dress 66 years in the making. Legacy A former royal palace in the heart of Paris, built for kings and art, its halls now draped in Thai silk. Outside, the Seine carries its usual indifferent grey. Inside, visitors from a dozen countries are standing very still in front of a gold-and-black gown that stopped the room. That gown, a Chud Thai Siwalai , has been stopping rooms for over six decades. It’s just that now the rooms are in Paris. The Dress That Started With a Problem In 1960, Queen Sirikit was preparing to accompany King Bhum
title_cn: 泰式筒裙征服巴黎——泰国最优雅传统服饰的66年传承
summary_cn: 泰国皇家传统服饰Chud Thai Siwalai在巴黎皇宫展出，这件金黑色长裙已有超60年历史，源于1960年为国王和王后设计，代表泰国优雅文化典范，吸引来自十多个国家的参观者驻足观看。

title: 前F1车手回应泰国受伤事件：不是袭击 还会再来泰国
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，此前，59岁的芬兰前一级方程式赛车（F1）车手Mika Salo在曼谷过人行横道时，腿部遭骑摩托车者持刀划伤，随后被送往医院治疗。警方之后也对其进行了询问。 警方透露，目前警方正前往现场调取监控录像，并收集事发周边证据。由于此前并无人正式报案，包括Salo本人也未向警方报警，因此案件仍在进一步调查中。 警方同时从医院方面获悉，此前也曾出现过泰国人及外国游客遭遇类似伤势的情况。警方怀疑，伤口可能是被摩托车车牌擦划所致，因此目前正进一步核实事实，并调查真正原因。 对此，Salo此前接受采访时表示，事发当天的情况更像是一场意外事故，自己当时完全不知道发生了什么，直到发现已经受伤后才立即前往医院治疗。他表示，自己并不认为这是一起袭击事件，因为并未感觉到遭人攻击，而且财物也没有任何损失。 这位前F1车手还向警方表达感谢，称警方一直给予照顾和帮助。他表示，自己之所以来到泰国，是因为喜欢阳光，也喜欢泰国民众。泰国天气很好，适合休养和恢复身体。他还强调，未来一定还会再次来到泰国，因为自己对泰国的安全环境充满信心，也让他感到十分温暖。 （编译：hansa；审核：wan；来源：thethaiger） The post 前F1车手回应泰国受伤事件：不是袭击 还会再来泰国 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 前F1赛车手Mika Salo回应泰国受伤事件：系意外非袭击 表示还会再来
summary_cn: 59岁芬兰前一级方程式赛车手Mika Salo在曼谷过人行横道时腿部遭划伤，警方怀疑伤口可能由摩托车车牌擦划所致。Salo回应称这是意外事故而非有意袭击，感谢警方协助，表示对泰国安全环境和民众充满信心，未来还会再来泰国。

title: 泰国咖啡市场卷疯了 最赚的为何还是星巴克
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月27日，据泰媒报道，在竞争者遍地开花的市场中，星巴克泰国业务年营收仍突破100亿泰铢。Coffee Concepts零售公司作为星巴克在泰国的特许经营权持有方，其经营业绩如下： 2021年营收61.36亿泰铢，利润1.65亿泰铢； 2022年营收83.9亿泰铢，利润8.33亿泰铢； 2023年营收98.47亿泰铢，利润10.29亿泰铢； 2024年营收105.13亿泰铢，利润9.78亿泰铢； 2025年营收108.60亿泰铢，利润10.38亿泰铢，相较上一年营收增长3.3%，利润增长6.1%。 如今优质咖啡越来越容易买到，更便宜、更方便的新品牌几乎遍布城市每一个角落。消费者的选择，从几十泰铢一杯的大众咖啡，到强调独特体验的精品咖啡应有尽有。那么，为什么星巴克仍然能够维持增长？ 分析指出如下4点： 1.聚焦高端黄金地段扩张门店 根据截至2026年5月25日的数据，星巴克在泰国共有497家门店。如果单看门店数量，星巴克显然并不与Café Amazon处于同一竞争级别。目前Café Amazon门店已超过4700家，而Punthai咖啡也已拥有超过2308家门店。 但星巴克更侧重于布局其他连锁品牌较难进入的高端黄金地段，例如高端综合体项目、豪华公寓、A级写字楼、知名私立医院，以及持续扩张得来速门店。 2.采用“第三空间”战略 提到一家既能聊天、又能办公、还能边喝饮品
title_cn: 泰国咖啡市场卷疯了 最赚的为何还是星巴克
summary_cn: 尽管泰国咖啡市场竞争激烈、各类品牌遍地开花，由Coffee Concepts代理的星巴克泰国业务仍保持强劲增长。2025年营收108.60亿泰铢，同比增长3.3%，利润10.38亿泰铢。虽然星巴克门店数（497家）远少于Café Amazon等竞争对手，但其聚焦高端商圈布局、采用「第三空间」战略等差异化竞争优势，使其持续保持盈利能力。

title: Israel, Thailand mark 72 years with farm upgrade instead of party
desc: Israel, Thailand mark 72 years with farm upgrade instead of party Legacy Israel has redirected funds from its national day celebrations to community development projects in Thailand as the two countries mark 72 years of diplomatic relations . The Israeli embassy in Bangkok said it chose to support local initiatives rather than hold a reception, citing the ongoing conflict in the Middle East . Israeli Ambassador to Thailand Alona Fisher-Kamm explained the decision at a ceremony held on May 25 at the Mercy Centre’s HDF Mercy Farm, also known as Baan Suan Mercy, in Saphan Sung district, Ban
title_cn: 以色列与泰国纪念建交72周年 以农场项目升级代替庆祝活动
summary_cn: 以色列驻泰大使馆日前举行活动纪念以色列与泰国建交72周年。与往年举办外交招待会不同，大使馆将庆祝经费转向社区发展项目。驻泰大使Alona Fisher-Kamm于5月25日在曼谷沙南僧区的慈悲家园农场主持仪式，宣布支持该农场升级项目。大使馆表示此举旨在支持本地社区倡议，同时亦反映出对中东地区冲突的关注。
